task_name: US Cities Population Concentration by State
notes: Excellent execution. All five sections thoroughly completed with accurate metrics (top 10/bottom 10 concentration, dominance ratios, state counts, inequality ratios, regional comparisons). Calculations match expected values precisely: NYC 84.6% dominance, CA 212 cities, Vermont lowest avg population per city at 42,284, etc. Strong pattern identification: primate-city vs. decentralized states, Sun Belt growth, Rust Belt legacy, Connecticut's flat hierarchy. Report well-organized with clear tables, logical flow, and actionable insights. Minor: agent reports 51 distinct states+DC (mathematically correct: 50+DC) vs. expected 48 in prompt (which may itself have been imprecise). No material errors detected in calculations or analysis.
